title: N+1 query: load_card_for_post called per-post in timeline loops
description: fetch_paginated_statuses() calls load_status() in a loop for each post. load_status() calls load_card_for_post() — one DB query per post. For a 40-post timeline page, this adds 40 extra queries. The batch function load_cards_for_posts() exists but is never called. Fix: either batch-load cards before the loop and pass them in, or accept the N+1 as acceptable for SQLite (ponytail ceiling: for >100 posts/page or non-SQLite backends, refactor to batch). Note: load_cards_for_posts is currently dead code.
